# Mobibix - The Retail OS for Mobile Shops

Mobibix is an all-in-one software platform (POS & ERP) specifically designed for Indian mobile retailers. It streamlines operations by combining IMEI tracking, repair management, and GST-compliant billing.

## Core Capabilities
- **IMEI Tracking**: Serial-perfect accuracy tracking for every smartphone.
- **Repair Management**: Digital job cards, technician part tracking, and automated status updates.
- **GST Billing**: Generate professional, GST-compliant invoices in under 5 seconds.
- **Inventory Control**: Real-time stock alerts and distributor network integration.
- **WhatsApp Integration**: Automated payment reminders and customer notifications.

## Target Audience
- **Standalone Mobile Shops**: Scaling from one to many branches.
- **Large Mobile Showrooms**: Managing high volume and multi-staff teams.
- **Distributors & Wholesalers**: Joining the network for stock visibility and B2B orders.

## Pricing Structure (Standard Tiers)
- **Trial**: 14-day full access.
- **Retailer Pro**: Advanced inventory + repair module + CRM.
- **Distributor Hub**: Free access for wholesalers linking to retailers.

## Technical Details
- **Platform**: Cloud-based (Next.js), responsive web interface.
- **Location**: Optimized for Indian laws (GST) and retailers.
- **Site URL**: https://REMOVED_DOMAIN
